posts.caption: Yes yes, feeling humbled to playing support for the likes of @buunshin alongside local talent @fairbrother__  special thank you to @fuzennz and @drop.bass.nz for this booking and to @themothershipnz for providing a space for events like this to happen in 🔈 tickets are on sale now, Link in Bio

Yes yes 🙌🏻 I am craving the BASS 🎶 and feeling honoured to be playing @dimensionfestivalnz again at the Drop Zone bringing the underground bass flavour on the @boom_candy_official rig. With some world class artists @truthdubstep @optimus.gryme.official @mctaliofficial @paigejulia.music guaranteed to be 🔥 IYKYK

Yes yes the festival season is fast approaching and we’re stepping it up for the Drop Zone this year, to get a taste of the local talent we are having a warmup. @daffron_music @jonny.c.o @foxglovenz @coastr_nz @dimensionfestivalnz

Closing the night off for this absolute legend of underground music. Cannot wait to flex on that ghost sound system again. I’ve got a few tickets to giveaway if you PM me 😌 ooosh so grateful for this @zed_bias @neckofthewoodsnz

Yes yes Wagwan 🙌🏻 @dimensionfestivalnz is fast approaching and I am grateful I will be paying some of my favourite music alongside my bass culture family. Stay safe and remember we are a community that watches out for each other. Much love #bassculture
Very much looking forward to this. Mampi is a don and a weapon on the decks. @cassettenine @mampi_swift
What an adventure this was. Much love to all the crew who came and showed support. Also to the Dimension team for putting another beautiful event on. So much love on that piece of land.

Been waiting a hot minute for this. @glxy_official are absolute dons, their sound pushes the genre, their music is inspiring. Get ready for some proper bass heavy underground business. Brought to you by @liquidlowdown with the finest support from @mctaliofficial @rhyas_nz and myself. Going down on Friday 5th August #dnb
Playing on the ghost sound system tonight. Really looking forward to rolling out something special @coco__nz @neckofthewoodsnz @rellisdnbnz

This Saturday 21st August it’s going down at @neckofthewoodsnz 🔈 The Auckland heats are set to be a furious  battle with @bond.roby and myself defending our titles. Come show support for all involved. Thanks to @fuzennz @breakingbeats__nz @northernbassnz and @allenandheath
